title: Trusted Travels
description: Server mod/plugin where you can easily travel to other servers. It uses Mojangs new transfer packet.
body:
# What is it?
This is a mod/plugin made for jumping between your servers. It uses Mojangs new transfer packets. You can make pre-made destinations for your other servers. The mod is originally made for a survival/creative combo. Use this if you don't want to set up a proxy server.

__This mod is not meant to replace proxy servers__
Big multiplayer servers use proxy servers for multiple reasons. This is intended for having a small network of servers. For example an SMP with a creative server.

# Config
![A config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/496ba7e9ac415214de1f9f514ccf398632b46088.png)
_Ex. photo_

Config structure 
```
servers:
  #add as many servers as needed
  <name of server>:
    address: <ip for server>
    port: <port for server, Minecraft default port is 25565>
```

# Server.properties
You need to ensure that the server you are going to has 
`accepts-transfers=true` in the server.properties. It's not going to work otherwise!

# Commands

```
/server <name> - The name is the one you put in the config
/tt reload - Reloads to the current config
```

# Looking for a server?
